title: Senior Financial Analyst - Punjab National Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Punjab National Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Punjab National Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Punjab National Bank:
Punjab National Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank!
